CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:ContinueCard.kt$(item.title, style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface, maxLines = 1, overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis)
ArgumentListWrapping:FilmaxChip.kt$( if (selected) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer else Color.Transparent, tween(240), label = "chipBg", )
ArgumentListWrapping:FilmaxErrorModal.kt$(Icons.Filled.Refresh, contentDescription = null, tint = v.onColor, modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp))
FunctionNaming:ContinueCard.kt$@Composable fun ContinueCard( item: Item, progress: Float, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
FunctionNaming:FilmaxBadge.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxBadge( text: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, style: FilmaxBadgeStyle = FilmaxBadgeStyle.Primary, icon: ImageVector? = null, )

FunctionNaming:FilmaxButton.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxButton( text: String, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, variant: FilmaxButtonVariant = FilmaxButtonVariant.Filled, icon: ImageVector? = null, enabled: Boolean = true, )
FunctionNaming:FilmaxChip.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxChip( label: String, selected: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

FunctionNaming:FilmaxCollectionCard.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxCollectionCard( title: String, accent: Color, icon: ImageVector, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, subtitle: String? = null, posterUrl: String? = null, )
FunctionNaming:FilmaxEmptyState.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxEmptyState( icon: ImageVector, title: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, subtitle: String? = null, )
FunctionNaming:FilmaxErrorModal.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxErrorModal( error: AppError, onDismiss: () -> Unit, onPrimary: () -> Unit, onSecondary: (() -> Unit)? = null, )
FunctionNaming:FilmaxListGroup.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxListGroup( modifier: Modifier = Modifier, title: String? = null, content: @Composable ColumnScope.() -> Unit, )

FunctionNaming:FilmaxListGroup.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxListRow( icon: ImageVector, label: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onClick: (() -> Unit)? = null, accent: Color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary, value: String? = null, badge: String? = null, labelColor: Color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface, showDivider: Boolean = false, )
FunctionNaming:FilmaxSearchField.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxSearchField( query: String, onQueryChange: (String) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, placeholder: String = "Поиск", )

FunctionNaming:FilmaxStatCard.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxStatCard( label: String, value: String, accent: Color, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, sub: String? = null, shape: Shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp), )
FunctionNaming:FilmaxTabBar.kt$@Composable fun FilmaxTabBar( selected: FilmaxTab, onSelect: (FilmaxTab) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
FunctionNaming:FilmaxTabBar.kt$@Composable private fun TabItem( tab: FilmaxTab, selected: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
FunctionNaming:HorizontalRow.kt$@Composable fun HorizontalRow( title: String, accentColor: Color, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, subtitle: String? = null, content: @Composable () -> Unit, )
FunctionNaming:PosterCard.kt$@Composable fun FavButton( isFav: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

FunctionNaming:PosterCard.kt$@Composable fun PosterCard( item: Item, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, isFav: Boolean = false, // null — карточка без сердечка (напр. на Главной избранное не показываем). onFavClick: (() -> Unit)? = null, )
FunctionNaming:PosterImage.kt$@Composable fun GradientPosterPlaceholder(accentColor: Color, modifier: Modifier = Modifier)

FunctionNaming:PosterImage.kt$@Composable fun PosterImage( url: String, contentDescription: String?, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, shape: Shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp), accentColor: Color = Color(0xFFB4305A), )
FunctionNaming:RatingPill.kt$@Composable fun RatingPill( rating: Double?, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, compact: Boolean = false, )
